name: kw-agent-exporter
description: Keller Williams branch agent CSV exporter

scripts.postinstall: plutil -replace CFBundleName -string 'KW Agent CSV Exporter' node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/Info.plist && plutil -replace CFBundleDisplayName -string 'KW Agent CSV Exporter' node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/Info.plist && plutil -replace CFBundleIdentifier -string 'com.local.kwagentexporter' node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/Info.plist || true
